description: Cabinet lines compared by box construction, hardware quality, and finish durability.

attributes.label: Primary Material
attributes.explanation: Material choice drives durability, maintenance, and long-term cost.

attributes.label: Size Specification
attributes.explanation: Dimensional fit is usually the first pass/fail criterion.

attributes.label: Performance Metric
attributes.explanation: Category-specific performance metric should be compared side-by-side.

attributes.label: Warranty
attributes.explanation: Warranty terms signal manufacturer confidence and replacement risk.

attributes.label: Maintenance Level
attributes.explanation: Maintenance needs affect ongoing cost and owner satisfaction.

watch_out_factors.title: Hidden Install Costs
watch_out_factors.description: Trim kits, adapters, or substrate prep can materially change final price.

watch_out_factors.title: Code Compatibility
watch_out_factors.description: Local plumbing/electrical/building codes may restrict allowed products.

buyer_guide_key_points: Validate rough-in and dimensional fit before purchase.
Compare warranty exclusions, not just duration.
Confirm replacement part availability and lead times.
contractor_questions: What site conditions could make this product unsuitable?
Are there code or manufacturer requirements we must follow exactly?
What accessory parts are required beyond the base product?
